LanguageData.HAR_OT_Material_a.label: Dystychia
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Material_a.description:
A rare metal said to be possessed by Haos.
Its luster is beautiful enough to captivate anyone who sees it.

It is also a first-rate crafting material, capable of bringing out tremendous power when used in arms and armor.
Its true value, however, may lie in furniture and other objects that can become works of art.

Many factions are trying to uncover how Dystychia is obtained, but the answer remains unknown.
Some even whisper the outlandish claim that it is a gift from the god the Outerms worship.
